hero.title: Redesigning the construction project creation journey
hero.subtitle: Optimising on-site data capture to reduce drop-off.

context.title: Context & Challenge
context.project: Project: redesign of the construction creation flow for ChantierPro (construction SaaS). The goal was to simplify a complex workflow while maintaining industry habits.
context.methodology: Methodology: 4-day design challenge, using AI assistance for strategic analysis and efficiency.
objectives: Identify friction points in the current journey
Deliver a high-fidelity prototype ready for testing
